drafts.name: El Concilio California — VP Civic Engagement (Dr. Inés Ruiz-Huston)
drafts.note: Largest Latino-serving nonprofit in the Central Valley; Modesto office 1314 H St (~1 mi). Alt: jrod@elconcilio.org (CEO), esan@elconcilio.org (Health & Well-Being). Draft id 19f802a5de0d39b1
drafts.copy_message:
Subject: Partnership Invitation: The Makeup Blowout Sale — Modesto, CA (July 24-26, 2026)

Hello Dr. Ruiz-Huston,

I am Eli Frenkel, PR Manager at The Makeup Blowout Sale Group. We're hosting a free makeup pop-up event in Modesto, CA from July 24-26, 2026, with 800-1,000 attendees expected.

As the Central Valley's largest Latino-serving nonprofit, El Concilio is a trusted hub for the Latina women and families across Modesto — exactly the community we love to welcome — and we would be honored to offer them something special close to home.

Our proposal: a 10% discount coupon for the women and families you serve to use at the event, plus a free registration/info table at our event entrance on a day of your choice to share your programs and connect with attendees.

Event page: https://events.themakeupblowout.com/events/modesto-ca-2026/

If interested, please reply at your convenience.

Eli Frenkel, PR Manager · The Makeup Blowout Sale Group · (323) 384-2662
